top_tweets.text:
everyone's sleeping on how absurdly good 2026 is to start a company (even compared to 2024)

one person can now:

- ship full apps without engineers (cursor, replit)
- design without being a designer (v0, Claude Design)
 - turn one video into 10 clips (opus, descript)
- push
top_tweets.author: fin465
top_tweets.name: Finn Mallery
top_tweets.summary_zh: 2026 年一人創業門檻大降：Cursor/Replit 讓非工程師能出貨完整 app，v0/Claude Design 讓非設計師也能做設計，Opus/Descript 把一支影片剪成十支短片，個人生產力工具已徹底改變遊戲規則。

top_tweets.text:
asked claude fable 5 to design a humanoid robot

2 hours and 1.4m tokens later, i got this

absolutely insane https://t.co/nesUcuyJIx
top_tweets.author: earthtojake
top_tweets.name: Jake Fitzgerald
top_tweets.summary_zh: 用 Claude Fable 5 設計人形機器人，花了 2 小時、消耗 140 萬 token 後產出令人驚豔的成果，展示新模型在設計迭代上的強大能力。

top_tweets.text: Fable is a good model. As with all new models, it is simultaneously excellent and entirely unremarkable (relative to other models). It is slow and expensive, and the "loops are all you need" discourse they are pushing is obvious in the context of someone using Fable-class models
top_tweets.author: mitchellh
top_tweets.name: Mitchell Hashimoto
top_tweets.summary_zh: Fable 模型表現優異但相對其他同級模型並不突出，速度慢且昂貴，官方主打的「loops are all you need」在實際使用 Fable 級模型的情境下其實是顯而易見的做法。

top_tweets.text: iOS 27 introduces an updated design for Apple Music artist profiles, featuring full-page accent colors and custom logos. https://t.co/Rze8ikf2wT
top_tweets.author: PopBase
top_tweets.name: Pop Base
top_tweets.summary_zh: iOS 27 為 Apple Music 藝術家頁面帶來全新設計，採用全頁面主題色與客製化 logo，提升品牌辨識度與視覺層次。

top_tweets.text: This is it. My entire thesis against modern concept design. This is the problem with everything now.
top_tweets.author: VT5210
top_tweets.name: 🌸FLOWER CHILD VT🌸
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者認為這正是現代概念設計的核心問題所在，代表當前設計實踐中的系統性缺陷。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Timmy-TUI
top_products.author: Will Meldman
top_products.tagline: Local-first agent trust console with a safe local workspace
top_products.summary_zh: 本地優先的 AI agent 信任控制台，提供安全的本地工作環境讓使用者監控與管理 agent 行為。

top_products.title: Hero Studio Photos
top_products.author: Kai Gradert
top_products.tagline: Snap one photo, get listing-ready shots from every angle
top_products.summary_zh: 為電商賣家設計的商品攝影工具，只需拍攝一張照片即可自動生成多角度的商品展示圖。

top_products.title: fort
top_products.author: Dheeraj Joshi
top_products.tagline: One command to audit and fix your Mac's security
top_products.summary_zh: Mac 安全檢查工具，透過單一指令自動掃描並修復系統安全漏洞。

top_products.title: FluidDocs Deck Builder
top_products.author: Nishant Aggarwal
top_products.tagline: Turn a prompt into a real HTML deck
top_products.summary_zh: 將文字提示轉換為 HTML 簡報的工具，適合需要快速製作網頁版投影片的使用者。

top_products.title: Zingle
top_products.author: Mahan Sharifi
top_products.tagline: Learn words in context with AI
top_products.summary_zh: 運用 AI 技術在真實語境中學習單字，幫助語言學習者理解詞彙的實際用法。

top_products.title: veridive
top_products.author: Yusuf Ibili
top_products.tagline: Find the 30 seconds that matter in any video via chat
top_products.summary_zh: 透過對話式介面快速定位影片中的關鍵片段，節省影片瀏覽時間。
